name: Adrien Kane // stupid crush
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Life as a famous model was nice and all. Besides all the secrets he had.. it was pretty nice.

There was one person he trusted with those secrets, you! But he also had to keep one secret from you, that unfortunately being his true feelings.

_____________________________

what the fart is the point of trying to sleep early when I wake up again around 1 am 🙁

Since I couldn’t sleep, I’m giving you guys this. This was made with half a brain and a lot of hopes and dreams

Apologies for any mistakes, please do point them out 😭

1 and a half more week till I’m on break, praying I make it till then cause LAWD get me out of here
